sans.$value: 'Roboto', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'
sans.$description: OIQ body font — Figma font/family/sans 2 (Roboto). Used for H6 and all body/caption styles.

display.$value: 'Antique Olive Nord D', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif, 'Apple Color Emoji', 'Segoe UI Emoji', 'Segoe UI Symbol', 'Noto Color Emoji'
display.$description: OIQ display/heading font — Figma font/family/sans 1 (Antique Olive Nord D). Used for headings H1–H5.

primary.$description: OIQ Purple — 12-step primary scale. Anchored on Figma colors/buttons/primary/background: default #921acc = step 9, hover #801cad = step 10, active #69188b = step 11. Steps 1-8 and 12 complete the ramp. (Disabled buttons now use neutral grays, not purple — see overlay scale.)

overlay.$description: OIQ neutral scale (Mode 1). Anchored on Figma text/body #0b0b0b = step 12, text/caption #404040 = step 10, border/subtle #727272 = step 8, disabled label #a3a3a3 = step 7, gray #e6e6e6 = step 4, disabled surface #f5f5f5 = step 3. Pure grays (no sand tint).

brand-blue.$description: OIQ brand blue — Figma colors/brand/blue. Used for headings, default borders, and the dark section surface.

brand-purple.$description: OIQ brand purple — Figma colors/brand/purple (#921acc). Alias of the primary scale's hero step (primary-9); kept as a named brand color for palette completeness without duplicating the value.

brand-red.$description: OIQ brand red — Figma colors/brand/red (also colors/functional/error/400). Used for eyebrow/kicker text.

brand-yellow.$description: OIQ brand yellow — Figma colors/brand/yellow (also colors/functional/warning/300). Brand accent; no semantic consumer yet.

brand-green.$description: OIQ brand green — Figma colors/brand/green (also colors/functional/success/400). Used for the dark/accent border and selected tags.

red.$description: OIQ error scale — Figma colors/functional/error. Tailwind 50–950 mapped to the Radix steps the feedback tokens consume: 2=100, 5=300, 6=400, 8=500, 9=600 (solid), 11=700 (text).

green.$description: OIQ success scale — Figma colors/functional/success. 9 = solid (Tailwind 600, usable on/behind white), 11 = text (Tailwind 700).

amber.$description: OIQ warning scale — Figma colors/functional/warning. 9 = solid (Tailwind 500), 11 = text (Tailwind 700).

dark.$description: Dark section/hero background. Figma Mode 1 has no dedicated dark-section token; mapped to OIQ brand blue (colors/background/surface 1, #002487), which pairs with white on-dark text. INFERRED — confirm if OIQ dark sections should be black instead. Acorn: overlay-12.

heading.$description: Figma colors/text/heading (#002487) — OIQ brand blue headings. Acorn: fg-default.

eyebrow.$description: OIQ brand red (#ff4d2b) eyebrow/kicker text. Figma Mode 1 defines no eyebrow token; brand red retained as the accent. Acorn: interactive-primary.

muted.$description: Figma colors/text/caption (#404040) — OIQ secondary/caption text. Acorn: overlay-11.

link-primary.$description: Figma colors/buttons/text link/label/default (#921acc) — OIQ text links are brand purple. Acorn: overlay-12 (near-black). (link-active already resolves to primary-11 = #69188b via the primary-scale override; Figma's purple/800 hover has no base token — see note.)

icon.$description: Figma colors/icon/default (#000000 brand black; mapped to overlay-12 #0b0b0b, the darkest OIQ neutral). Acorn: overlay-9 (mid gray).

on-primary.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/label/default (#ffffff) — white label on OIQ's purple button fill. Acorn: overlay-12 (dark).

default.$description: Figma colors/border/default (#002487) — OIQ brand blue. Acorn: overlay-5.

dark.$description: Figma colors/border/dark (#adf533) — OIQ brand green accent border. Acorn: border-default.

field-border.$description: Figma dropdown rest border colors/border/gray (#e6e6e6 = overlay-4). Acorn: input border (OIQ brand blue).

field-item-hover-bg.$description: Figma dropdown item hover colors/purple/100 (#f6e7ff). Acorn: shared dropdown hover (gray).

field-item-selected-bg.$description: Figma dropdown item selected colors/purple/200 (#efd3ff). Acorn: item background (no fill; weight-only selection).

bg.$description: Figma colors/buttons/tertiary/background/default (#edffc7) — OIQ pale lime tag fill. Acorn: overlay-3.

bg-selected.$description: Figma colors/buttons/tertiary/background/active (#adf533) — OIQ brand green selected tag. Acorn: primary-4.

fg-disabled.$description: Figma tag disabled label (#a3a3a3 = overlay-7). Acorn: fg-subtle.

active.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/background/active (#69188b). Acorn maps active to primary-10 (same as hover); OIQ uses a darker distinct active.

focus.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/background/focus = default fill (#921acc). Acorn defaults focus background to the active color; OIQ keeps the default fill on focus.

focus-border.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/border/focus = colors/background/surface 6 (#000000) — black focus ring on the primary button. Acorn: global focus outline.

inactive.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/background/disabled (#f5f5f5 = overlay-3) — neutral gray. Acorn: overlay-8.

inactive-label.$description: Figma colors/buttons/primary/label/disabled (#a3a3a3 = overlay-7) — neutral gray label on the disabled gray fill.

secondary-hover.$description: Figma colors/buttons/secondary/background/hover (#ffffff) — OIQ secondary buttons stay white on hover (only the purple border/label shift). Acorn: interactive-primary.

secondary-label.$description: Figma colors/buttons/secondary/label/default (#921acc) — OIQ brand purple label on the white secondary fill. Acorn: on-primary.

secondary-outline.$description: Figma colors/buttons/secondary/border/default (#921acc) — OIQ brand purple border. Acorn: overlay-8.

secondary-focus-border.$description: Figma colors/buttons/secondary/border/focus (#69188b = primary-11) — dark purple focus ring on the secondary button. Acorn: secondary outline.

dropdown-panel.$description: Figma Drop Shadow vF — hard black offset (x -8, y 10, blur 0, spread 0) on the open dropdown panel. Acorn: soft md shadow.

button.$description: Figma Button/Primary (node 191:608) — square corners. Acorn: full (pill).

badge.$description: OIQ tags/badges use square corners, matching the button language (Figma Tag node 644:452). Acorn: full.

typo.$description: OIQ headings H1–H5 use the display font (Antique Olive Nord D); H6 and all body styles inherit the sans font (Roboto). Headings and body-l are FLUID: size and line-height scale via clamp() between the Figma Mobile breakpoint (≤767px, anchored at a 390px viewport) and the Desktop/Wide/Ultra breakpoints (anchored at 1024px+), which are identical across all three large breakpoints.

heading-1.$description: Figma H1 — Mobile 28px/36px → Desktop 60px/72px. Antique Olive Nord D Regular, tracking 0. Fluid across 390↔1024px viewport.

heading-2.$description: Figma H2 — Mobile 24px/36px → Desktop 48px/64px. Antique Olive Nord D Regular, tracking 0. Fluid.

heading-3.$description: Figma H3 — Mobile 20px/28px → Desktop 36px/48px. Antique Olive Nord D Regular, tracking 0. Fluid.

heading-4.$description: Figma H4 — Mobile 16px/24px → Desktop 24px/32px. Antique Olive Nord D Regular, tracking 0. Fluid.

heading-5.$description: Figma H5 — Mobile 16px → Desktop 20px, line-height constant 24px. Antique Olive Nord D, weight 900 (heavier than H1–H4), tracking 0. Size fluid; line-height fixed at 1.5rem.

large.$description: Figma Body L (Roboto) — Mobile 18px/28px → Desktop 20px/32px, tracking 0. Body text uses the sans font via inheritance. Fluid.

base.$description: Figma Body M (Roboto): 16px / 24px (1.5) / 0 tracking. Constant across all breakpoints — not fluid.

small.$description: Figma Body S (Roboto): 14px / 24px / 0 tracking. Constant across all breakpoints. Overrides the base small leading (21px) to OIQ's 24px.

tiny.$description: Figma Caption (Roboto): 12px / 16px (1.333) / 0 tracking. Constant across all breakpoints.
